Perfect! I successfully called the manySchemasTool with valid sample data that meets all the schema requirements. The tool accepted all the parameters and returned the complete data structure. Here's what I provided:

- **String fields**: Various text samples with different constraints (min/max length, email format, URL, UUID, CUID, regex pattern, emoji)
- **Number fields**: Different numeric values meeting constraints (greater than, less than, multiples, integers)
- **Arrays**: String arrays with minimum and maximum length requirements
- **Dates**: Valid date-time strings with different temporal constraints
- **Objects**: Nested and flat objects with required properties
- **Special types**: Nullable field (set to null), enums, unions, and default values

All the data was validated successfully according to the schema constraints.
